title: 💻 Claude Code: Best Practices for Agentic Coding : r/ClaudeAI
content:

# Anthropic's Guide to Claude Code: Best Practices for Agentic Coding : r/ClaudeAI. # Anthropic's Guide to Claude Code: Best Practices for Agentic Coding. 👉Claude Code: Best practices for agentic coding. 👉Claude Code: Best practices for agentic codingThey go into stuff like:Setting up aCLAUDE.mdto guide Claude's behavior within your repo. *   Setting up a`CLAUDE.md`to guide Claude's behavior within your repo. Debugging and iterating with Claude Code over multiple turnsTL;DR:Anthropic recommends structuring your repo to make Claude "agentic" — i.e., act more like an intelligent assistant who understands your goals, tools, and context. A lot of the power comes from writing a clear, detailed`CLAUDE.md`that explains what your code does and how Claude should help. The blog post includes real-world examples and prompt templates that work well.Just came across this great post via Alex Albert’s tweet and thought folks here would appreciate it:. Anthropic recommends structuring your repo to make Claude "agentic" — i.e., act more like an intelligent assistant who understands your goals, tools, and context. Best practices for Claude Code from Anthropic.

As a non-technical team of one, they use Claude Code to automate repetitive marketing tasks and create agentic workflows that would traditionally require significant engineering resources. title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing #Linux - Qiita
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing. Claude Code users often face the challenge of "wanting to execute multiple prompts sequentially" and "automating code generation with overnight batch processing." Many also need "project-specific prompt management" for their development workflows. This article provides a detailed explanation of the batch processing features added in Prompt Scheduler v1.0.2, along with real development scenarios. I want to clearly state that this is an independent personal development project with no connection whatsoever to Anthropic's Claude or Claude Code. Batch processing in Prompt Scheduler refers to **the functionality of pre-defining multiple prompts and automatically executing them in a specified order**. * Continuous prompt execution in active development projects. # Overnight batch (aggressive execution ignoring limits) \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --ignore-approaching-limit \ --hours # Phased execution during business hours \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --stop-at. * **Project management**: Parallel processing of multiple projects with `--prompt-file`. * **Limit processing**: Aggressive execution with `--ignore-approaching-limit`.

title: 💻 Batch Processing Skill for Claude Code | Scale AI Workflows
content:

# Batch Processing. Optimizes large-scale task execution through agent swarms, API batch processing, and intelligent loops to maximize efficiency and reduce costs. ### Related Skills. Manages Discord operations including messaging, reactions, and channel management directly through Claude. Automates code formatting and linting checks to ensure code quality and CI compliance before committing. Discover MCP servers that connect MCP clients like Claude and Cursor to your favorite tools. Browse the MCP Market to get started. The Batch Processing skill for Claude Code empowers developers to handle high-volume tasks—such as reviewing dozens of files or processing hundreds of documents—without linear increases in time or token costs. It provides a strategic framework for selecting the optimal execution method based on scale: utilizing agent swarms for rapid parallel processing of 5-20 items, the Anthropic API Batch for 50% cost savings on massive datasets, or sequential loops for tasks with complex dependencies. Sync skills to **Claude Cowork**, **Claude Code**, **Codex**, and more.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice - SmartScope
content:

* /batch Command: Parallel Execution of Large-Scale Code Changes. * Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration. # Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. * The `/batch` command executes codebase-wide migrations safely using **parallel agents + Git Worktree** isolation. * Headless mode (`claude -p`) provides **non-interactive integration** for CI/CD pipelines and shell scripts. Intermediate to advanced Claude Code users looking to scale up with large-scale changes and CI/CD integration. The latter is a non-interactive execution mode for embedding AI processing into CI/CD pipelines. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. Choose headless mode when embedding AI processing into existing CI/CD pipelines. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶.

title: 💻 Show HN: Send Claude Code tasks to the Batch API at 50% off | Hacker News
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

| |  | | --- | | Show HN: Send Claude Code tasks to the Batch API at 50% off (github.com/s2-streamstore) | | 23 points by misker1 4 months ago | hide | past | favorite | 1 comment | | Hey HN. I built this because my Anthropic API bills were getting out of hand (spoiler: they remain high even with this, batch is not a magic bullet). So here is a small MCP that lets you send work directly to Anthropic's Batch API from inside Claude Code, for the same quality responses just 50% cheaper, results come back in ~30min-1hr. ```  How it works: you type /batch review this codebase for security issues, Claude gathers all the context, builds a self-contained prompt, ships it to the Batch API via an MCP server, and you get notified in the status bar when it's done (optional). I removed the curl | bash setup and at this stage of the project i feel more confident sharing the manual setup instructions.

title: 💻 What Is Claude Code /simplify and /batch? The Built-In Commands That Fix Overengineering
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# What Is Claude Code /simplify and /batch? Claude Code's /simplify and /batch commands help you clean up bloated code and run large refactors in parallel. Claude Code tackles this with two commands worth knowing: `/simplify` and `/batch`. The `/batch` command lets you run operations across multiple files simultaneously, so large refactors don’t require running the same prompt over and over. Here’s how both work and when to use them. ## What Claude Code Is. Claude Code is Anthropic’s terminal-based AI coding assistant. It connects to your codebase through the file system, which means it can see the actual state of your project rather than relying on what you paste into a chat window. Instead of writing a long prompt explaining what you want, you type a command and Claude handles the task with the right behavior built in. When you run `/simplify` on a file or function, Claude Code evaluates:. The output is a refactored version of the code along with an explanation of what changed and why.
